name: Smoke and Mirrors
flavor: The stage fills with fog, mirrors unfold from nowhere, and suddenly nobody - including your enemies - can tell where anyone actually is.
description: You fill a 20-foot cube within range with a bank of illusory smoke and drifting false reflections. The area becomes heavily obscured for as long as you concentrate on this trick. The smoke has no substance - it doesn't impede movement and can't be dispersed by wind - and creatures relying on darkvision see only more illusory smoke, not through it. You may designate any number of creatures, including yourself, that see the area normally instead, letting you use the cloud as cover for yourself and your allies while it blinds everyone else.
sheetSummary: Action, 60 ft, cooldown 2, concentration up to 10 min. Fills a 20-ft cube with illusory heavily-obscuring smoke (no wind dispersal, ignores darkvision); you may designate chosen creatures to see through it normally.
